nasb.text: There were also male cult prostitutes in the land. They did according to all the abominations of the nations which the Lord dispossessed before the sons of Israel.

esv.text: and there were also male cult prostitutes in the land. They did according to all the abominations of the nations that the Lord drove out before the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 國內又有男妓，他們仿效耶和華在以色列人面前所趕出的外族人，行了一切可憎的事。

ccb.text: 国中甚至男庙妓充斥。犹大人仿效耶和华在以色列人面前赶走的外族人，行各种可憎之事。
